messages.text: Hey Alice, can you take a quick look at the system log from this morning? The server rebooted around midnight and I want to make sure everything came back up cleanly. Just the boot sequence stuff at the beginning of the log should be enough. Let me know what you find!
Heads up team - we had a scheduled reboot on the main server last night. All services should be back online. Let me know if anyone notices anything unusual.
